name: Cyberpunk AI (Dark)
description: Flashy, neon-accents for high-energy tech trends.
brief: Cyberpunk AI - Energetic mobile story with focus on trend-led news.
ai_instructions: Tone: Hype and Futuristic. Use 1-2 powerful emojis per slide. Make the titles extremely 'Catchy' to grab attention in a vertical feed.
